title: Derive Open VSX extension version from tags and commits

source.subject: ci(open-vsx): derive extension version from tags and commits

body:
Derives VS Code extension **version from git tags and commit distance** for Open VSX publishes.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`23fbd84`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/23fbd84)
- **Subject:** ci(open-vsx): derive extension version from tags and commits
- **Completed:** 2026-04-22

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `editor-extension`
- **Deliverable:** `v01-open-vsx`

## Relation
Required for repeatable extension releases on `main`.
